'''''Red Star 1''''' was a modified [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] owned by [[Countess/Legends|Countess]] [[Iran Ryad]]. The countess had her fighter painted in a [[red]] color scheme. The fighter destroyed in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] when she was charged with [[Treason/Legends|treason]] and defeated by [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]].

==Behind the scenes==
"More Starships!" gives the cost of ''Red Star 1'' as 262,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] compared to the 200,000 credit cost of a standard TIE Defender. However, other sources give the standard model a value of 300,000 credits, which would imply a greater cost for ''Red Star 1''.

{{Ship-stub}}
